my_thoughts: Answers the priority question by mapping the hierarchy, defining the 'person' as a contingent effect (composite, shadow of the mind) derived from Pure Being/Knowing.
accumulated_insight: Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in seeking_ontological_definition... Now seeing seeking_identity_hierarchy with structural_analogy. Pattern emerging.
abstract_pattern: When student asks 'which is more fundamental?', DO NOT pick a side. Show that one is the source and the other is a derivative appearance. Map the causal chain from source to appearance.
visible_response: I am not the cloud, I am the space in which it appears.

pedagogical_hooks.angle: The confusion is the mind trying to grasp what can only be recognized. Stop grasping, start recognizing.
Certainty is not found in more definitions. It is found in direct seeing.
